name: Annandale VA, USA

rent.notes: Older housing stock, immigrant commercial scene. ~25% cheaper than Fairfax City for comparable 2BR. Fairfax County.

groceries.notes: Korean + Latino supermarkets (H Mart, Grand Mart) notably cheaper than Wegmans/Giant. Mixed shopper saves ~10% vs Fairfax average.

utilities.notes: Dominion Energy + Washington Gas + Fairfax Water.

healthcare.notes: Same Medicare baseline as Fairfax County. Inova Fairfax Hospital 8 min away.

transportation.notes: Dunn Loring Metro (Orange line) 10 min. Interstate 495 + Interstate 395 access. Better Metro proximity than Fairfax City.

entertainment.notes: Korean BBQ district (Little Seoul), diverse dining. Cable+1Gig included.

miscellaneous.notes: HOA (homeowners association) dues, EZ-Pass tolls, Fairfax County vehicle tax.

medicalOOP.notes: Same retiree profile (macular degeneration, specialists at Inova/Johns Hopkins).

taxes.notes: Income tax computed from VA brackets; stored value 0 by convention.

healthcarePreMedicare.notes: ACA silver benchmark for 2-adult household both age ~60, before subsidies. County-level estimate (Fairfax County, VA). Northern Virginia (NOVA) marketplace: Anthem HealthKeepers, CareFirst, Kaiser. Estimated ±15% vs healthcare.gov quote — verify for a specific ZIP before relying on the number.

stateIncomeTax.exemptions: Age 65+ deduction $12K/person. SS fully exempt from VA tax.

salesTax.notes: Fairfax County 6% (4.3% state + 0.7% regional + 1% Northern Virginia (NOVA) transit)

propertyTax.notes: Renters: no direct property tax. Fairfax County vehicle personal property ~$4.57/$100 assessed.

taxes.notes: Fairfax County — same tax treatment as Fairfax City.

healthcare.notes: Inova Fairfax Medical Center (Level I trauma) 8 min away. Same healthcare infrastructure as Fairfax City.

acaMarketplace.notes: Northern Virginia (NOVA) marketplace: Anthem HealthKeepers, CareFirst, Kaiser. Metro pricing.
acaMarketplace.disclaimer: Estimated ±15% vs healthcare.gov quote — verify for a specific ZIP before relying on the number.

lifestyle.notes: Strong Korean and Central/South American communities. Mason District Park, Lake Accotink nearby. Easier Metro access than Fairfax City.

pros: Same Fairfax County tax treatment (Social Security exempt, retiree deductions)
Best grocery deal in Northern Virginia (NOVA) via Korean/Latino supermarkets
Closer to DC than Fairfax City (Dunn Loring Metro)
cons: Older housing stock — may need more maintenance
Fewer single-family homes than outer Northern Virginia suburbs
Still Northern Virginia-premium vs national average
